title: int() truncates, it doesn't round
problem: Round the measurement 3.9 to a whole number (we want 4).

trace.checkpoint_prompt: measurement is 3.9. After `rounded = int(measurement)` runs, what will rounded be?

trace.note: int(3.9) = 3, not 4. int() truncates toward zero — it chops the fraction off rather than rounding.
